title: エリートトレーナーとの出会い

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One morning, a flyer in my mailbox catches my
eye.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
"Aquarium Grand Opening!" "Right next to the
station! A tranquil space perfect for relaxation!"
choice_data_list:
This might be a nice change of pace for
<chrname>.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I don't want to let this opportunity pass us by. I
grab the flyer and go looking for her.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: The first place I check is the training track, but...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Unfortunately, my trainee isn't around. I decide
to invite her next time I see her and turn to leave.

text_block_list.name: Veteran Trainer A
text_block_list.text:
Whoa... Look at her go! It's like she's not even the
same Umamusume!

text_block_list.name: Veteran Trainer B
text_block_list.text:
That special training program's doing wonders for
her. She's barely even started, but it's like she's
already on a whole new level.

text_block_list.name: Trainers
text_block_list.text: Look! It's Trainer Kiryuin!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A crowd of people has formed nearby. I find
myself following their line of sight, where I see...

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text: Great work, Meek. You ran really well today.

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
Still, you lost focus a bit at the end. If you hadn't,
I think you could have gone even faster.

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
Try to concentrate right up until the finish line. I
know you can do it!

text_block_list.name: Happy Meek
text_block_list.text: Thank you, Trainer. I'll do my best... Hmph.

text_block_list.name: Skilled Trainer A
text_block_list.text:
That's Aoi Kiryuin... Did you know she's the heir
to the Kiryuin family? They've raised more
superstar runners than I can count...

text_block_list.name: Skilled Trainer A
text_block_list.text:
Right! She got the top score on the first-term
license exam, too!

text_block_list.name: Skilled Trainer B
text_block_list.text:
Happy Meek didn't use to be anything to write
home about, but recently she's been making
amazing progress!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It seems that Trainer Kiryuin and her trainee
Happy Meek are the ones attracting all the
attention.

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text: Hm? Ah! Excuse me! Are you...?

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
I knew it! You're
Trainer <username>!

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
That's right! I'm sorry, this must be quite sudden,
but... I've always admired you!

text_block_list.name: Happy Meek
text_block_list.text: Trainer... Who is this?

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text: Ah! I'm sorry, Meek! I just ran off, didn't I?

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text: Phew... Sorry, I didn't mean to scare everyone. Let's try this again, shall we?

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
It's a pleasure to meet you! My name is Aoi
Kiryuin. I'm a Tracen Academy trainer, just like
you.

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
And this is my trainee, Happy Meek. Meek, do
you want to say hello?

text_block_list.name: Happy Meek
text_block_list.text: Hello... I'm Happy Meek...

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text: Um, you may not be aware of this, but...

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
...You and I were actually assigned to Tracen
Academy at almost the same time.

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
Maybe this is weird, but I've always felt closer to
you because of that.

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
So I really hoped I'd have the chance to speak
with you someday.

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
Would you mind meeting up again in the future?
I'm sure we can learn a lot from each other.

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text: Thank you so much! It's an honor.

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text: Um, Meek? It's rude to stare, you know.

text_block_list.name: Happy Meek
text_block_list.text: Ah... Excuse me.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Despite Trainer Kiryuin's words, Happy Meek
keeps staring at me... or, more specifically, at
something in my hand.
choice_data_list: Are you interested in this flyer?

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
Huh... Is that an aquarium flyer? Meek, have you
been looking at this the whole time?
choice_data_list: Do you... want to go check it out?
Do you... want to go check it out?

text_block_list.name: Happy Meek
text_block_list.text: ...Huh?

text_block_list.name: Happy Meek
text_block_list.text: Wow... The jellyfish are so wavy...

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
Hehe... She's really having a great time. I never
knew Meek liked aquariums so much.

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text: But... are you sure I should be here?

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
I just... Well, the Trainer's Handbook—that is, the
teachings of the Kiryuin family—states that
"Umamusume must be given appropriate rest."

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
It also says the trainer is supposed to leave the
Umamusume to her own devices during rest
periods. That way she can truly relax.

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
So is it all right for me to accompany her? I
wouldn't be causing her stress, would I?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Trainer Kiryuin—ever the serious type—is worried
about neglecting her family's teachings.
However...

text_block_list.name: Happy Meek
text_block_list.text: Ah...! This starfish looks just like my trainer...

text_block_list.name: Happy Meek
text_block_list.text: ...I'll tell her later... Ehehe.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: When I look at Happy Meek...
choice_data_list: I think she's happy you're here.

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text: Really? Do you think so?
choice_data_list: It's important to get to know your trainee.

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text: Get to know her, huh...

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
Come to think of it, I didn't even realize she liked
aquariums until today.

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text: Maybe... I still don't really understand her at all...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After enjoying the aquarium with Trainer Kiryuin,
we all return to the academy and see Happy
Meek back to the dorms.

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
Thank you,
Trainer <username>.

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
Not only did you invite me on a wonderful day
out, you also taught me an important lesson.

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
Yes. Learning all you can about your trainee is
practically point one of the Trainer's Handbook.

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
I always thought that meant having a good grasp
of their physical capabilities.

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
But thanks to our conversation, I feel like now I
understand what it really means.

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text: Hehe. No need to be so humble.

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
I think I understand why you caught the director's
attention now.

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
You sincerely care about your trainee—not just as
a racer, but as an individual. That's where you
really shine as a trainer.

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
Well, I'll just have to work harder. I can't have you
leaving me behind!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Trainer Kiryuin and I make our way back to the
trainer dorm, talking about training theory all the
way.
